title: Steward (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''Steward''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Steward (Galidyn)|Steward]]''', the ruling figures of the [[Galidyn]] cities on [[Fyodos]].
*The '''[[Steward (Dellalt)|Steward]]''', the overseer of the vaults on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]].
*The '''[[Steward (Imperial Senate)|Stewards]]''', a team of officials in the [[Imperial Senate]]
*'''[[Steward (occupation)/Legends|Steward]]''', an occupation aboard [[Starship/Legends|starships]].
*'''[[Steward (occupation)|Steward]]''', an occupation caring for a location or group.

{{Disambig}}
